test: This is a test string in English

timeout.failure:
**Failed to timeout the user. Do I have the correct permissions? Make sure my role is higher than the user's role.
-# If the problem persists, please contact support.**
timeout.cannotHigher: **You cannot timeout a member with an equal or higher role than yours.**
timeout.cannotModerate: **I cannot timeout this user. They might have a higher role than me or have administrator permissions.**

ban.failure:
**Failed to ban/unban the user. Do I have the correct permissions? Make sure my role is higher than the user's role.
-# If the problem persists, please contact support.**
ban.cannotBot: **Why? reach out our support server for more help.**
ban.cannotHigher: **You cannot ban a member with an equal or higher role than yours.**
ban.botCannotHigher: **I cannot ban a member with an equal or higher role than mine.**
ban.cannotModerate: **I cannot ban this user. They might have a higher role than me or have administrator permissions.**

kick.error:
**Failed to kick the user. Do I have the correct permissions? Make sure my role is higher than the user's role.
-# If the problem persists, please contact support.**
kick.cannotHigher: **You cannot kick a member with an equal or higher role than yours.**
kick.botCannotHigher: **I cannot kick a member with an equal or higher role than mine.**
kick.cannotModerate: **I cannot kick this user. They might have a higher role than me or have administrator permissions.**

unban.no_premium: **This feature requires a premium subscription. Please upgrade to use mass unban.**
unban.noBans: **There are no banned members in this server.**
unban.massDesc: All banned members have been unbanned.

lock.error:
**Failed to lock the channel. Do I have the correct permissions?
-# If the problem persists, please contact support.**
lock.cannotLock: **I cannot lock this channel. Do I have the correct permissions?**

unlock.error:
**Failed to unlock the channel. Do I have the correct permissions?
-# If the problem persists, please contact support.**
unlock.cannotUnlock: **I cannot unlock this channel. Do I have the correct permissions?**

role.userNotFound: User not found in this guild.
role.alreadyHasRole: This user already has the specified role.

role.giveFail:

role.removeFail:
Failed to remove the role. Do I have the correct permissions? Make sure my role is higher than the role you're trying to remove.

role.removeBotSuccess: Successfully removed role {{role}} from {{success}} bots. Failed to remove role from {{fail}} bots. Reason: {{reason}}
role.giveAllSuccess: Successfully gave role {{role}} to {{success}} members. Failed to give role to {{fail}} members. Reason: {{reason}}
role.removeAllSuccess: Successfully removed role {{role}} from {{success}} members. Failed to remove role from {{fail}} members. Reason: {{reason}}
